headline: Jim Cramer on Qnity Electronics: “I Think the Company, Which Sells Materials for Semis, Is Fantastic”
summary: Jim Cramer reviewed Qnity Electronics, Inc. (NYSE:Q) while breaking down 16 stocks for a market facing higher energy costs and economic uncertainty. During the lightning round, a caller asked if Cramer thinks the company is a rising star, and he said: Yes, it is… And thank you for noticing this. This is a big club […]

headline: DuPont Enhances FilmTec Portfolio With Advanced NF Technology
summary: DuPont launches upgraded FilmTec NF element, boosting filtration efficiency, lowering energy use, and targeting growth in advanced water treatment markets.
